title: Generate R program to derive ADADAS (ADAS-Cog (item analysis))

inputs.prompt: Write an R program using the admiral package to create the ADADAS (ADAS-Cog (item analysis)) analysis dataset. The program must: (1) Read relevant SDTM source datasets and merge with ADSL, (2) Derive key variables: PARAMCD, ACITM01, ACITM02, ACITM03, ACTOT, AVAL, BASE, (3) Handle individual item parameter derivation, total score computation, item-level change analysis, (4) Apply ADaM variable attributes and metadata per specification, (5) Output xpt dataset with proper labels. The dataset contains approximately 2718 records.
